pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 40-46 clears Board Room from other events; verified in setup_data.py only 2 of 20 events have Board Room initially

privileged_info_summary: The task updates calendar event locations in Odoo 17. Two specific events ('Investor Update Preparation' and 'Budget Committee Meeting') have their location changed from 'Board Room' to 'Executive Conference Room - 3rd Floor'. These are the only two events with the old location, as setup_task.sh (lines 40-46) clears the Board Room location from all other events before the task begins. Data is synthetic, created by setup_data.py during environment initialization. All event names, original location, and target location values in metadata are correct.
